description: CCP-16 desync test vectors demonstrating v2 schema array root support readiness (can be converted to bare array root). Covers SFN wrap desync, multi-root conflict, clock drift desync recovery per spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md and 09-packets-timing.md. Independent mathematical oracles; no code-under-test dependency. Compare to ccp15.json and ccp_load_balancing.json structure.

vectors.name: desync_on_sfn_wrap
vectors.description: Unsigned 32-bit arithmetic for (current - last) on SFN wrap per spec. Triggers desync recovery state machine. Independent oracle from 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:325 and 09-packets-timing.md:250.

vectors.name: multi_root_version_conflict_desync
vectors.description: Conflicting DIO version from secondary root forces desync to avoid routing loops (RPL non-storing mode).

vectors.name: excessive_clock_drift_desync
vectors.description: Drift exceeding guard after beacon arrival triggers desync_recovery() and epoch_floor revalidation per spec timing rules.

vectors.name: desync_recovery_beacon_revalidate
vectors.description: After desync, first valid beacon resets state; test vector for recovery transition.
